detail.description: Ben Malgeri flies out to center fielder Derek Hill.
Ben Malgeri singles on a ground ball to third baseman Alec Bohm.
Ben Malgeri flies out to right fielder Lawrence Butler.
Ben Malgeri grounds out, shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Jeff McNeil.
Ben Malgeri doubles (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Zach McKinstry scores. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd.
Ben Malgeri out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Jasson Domínguez. Spencer Torkelson scores. Hao-Yu Lee to 3rd.
Ben Malgeri singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
Ben Malgeri pops out to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.
Ben Malgeri singles on a line drive to right fielder Jasson Domínguez. Zach McKinstry to 3rd.
Ben Malgeri grounds out, second baseman Nicky Lopez to first baseman Josh Smith. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.
Ben Malgeri singles on a ground ball to shortstop Ezequiel Duran.
Ben Malgeri pops out to first baseman Josh Smith in foul territory.
Ben Malgeri grounds out, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Josh Smith. Colt Keith scores. Zach McKinstry to 3rd.
Ben Malgeri singles on a line drive to center fielder Evan Carter. Zach McKinstry scores.
Ben Malgeri lines out sharply to left fielder Cody Bellinger.
Ben Malgeri grounds out to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.
Ben Malgeri grounds out, shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.
Ben Malgeri doubles (2) on a fly ball to right fielder Jo Adell.
Ben Malgeri grounds out, third baseman Denzer Guzman to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.
